changes.summary: Canonical home for PermissionRuleConditionsSchema, PermissionRuleSchema, and ResourcePermissionsSchema (inv-11). Replaced stub re-exports from ../schemas with z.object definitions and inferred types.

Removed inline permission schema definitions; import ResourcePermissionsSchema and PermissionRuleSchema for Comment/Poll/FeedItem/Community usage; re-export all permission schemas and types from ./schemas/permissions for barrel consumers.
Retired duplicated ResourcePermissions interface (48 lines); import type from @meriter/shared-types/schemas/permissions and re-export alongside other api-v1 types.

notes: API resource-permissions.interface.ts triplication remains for a downstream unit (outside write_set). Root index.ts barrel does not yet export ResourcePermissions type; web uses @meriter/shared-types/schemas/permissions subpath per Phase 1 Option B export map.
